prestazioni: Engine swap to a turbocharged **K3-VET** (660cc, DOHC 16V, 140hp stock in JDM Kei applications) with a **Garrett GT1549S** turbocharger, custom **HKS Hi-Power 60mm** blow-off valve, and **Toda Racing** forged pistons (8.5:1 compression) paired with **Eagle H-beam connecting rods** for 250hp+ reliability on **E85 fuel**.

Full **JUN Auto** 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with **SARD** 70mm titanium muffler and **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller for precise **1.2 bar (17.4 psi)** overboost mapping on a **Haltech Elite 1500** standalone ECU with **AEM X-Series** wideband O2 sensor.

**Tein Flex Z** coilovers with **500lb/in** front and **450lb/in** rear springs, **Cusco 22mm** front sway bar, **Ultra Racing** 3-point strut brace, and **Project Mu** 4-pot front brake calipers with **DBA 5000 Series** 280mm rotors for Kei-class weight reduction (850kg curb) and track-ready handling.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works** widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with **custom carbon fiber** overfenders to fit **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 15x8 +38 wheels wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** 195/50R15 tires.
**Seibon Carbon** hood with **custom heat extractor vents** and **Rally Art** front lip spoiler, paired with a **Voltex** Type-3 rear wing (250mm chord, 3D endplates) for downforce at 120mph+ speeds.

**Recaro SRD** Kei-spec bucket seats with **Sparco 6-point harnesses**, **Defi Advance BF** 60mm oil pressure/temp gauges in a **JDM Garage** A-pillar pod, and **Momo Mod.78** flat-bottom steering wheel with **NRG quick-release hub** for rally-inspired ergonomics.
